data.name: DAPR1301Title
data.value: The workflow type is not registered with the dependency injection provider

data.name: DAPR1301MessageFormat
data.value: The workflow type '{0}' is not registered with the dependency injection provider

data.name: DAPR1302Title
data.value: The workflow activity type is not registered with the dependency injection provider

data.name: DAPR1302MessageFormat
data.value: The workflow activity type '{0}' is not registered with the dependency injection provider

data.name: DAPR1303Title
data.value: The provided input type does not match the target workflow or activity input type

data.name: DAPR1303MessageFormat
data.value: The provided input type '{0}' does not match the expected input type '{1}' for {2} '{3}'

data.name: DAPR1304Title
data.value: The requested output type does not match the target workflow or activity output type

data.name: DAPR1304MessageFormat
data.value: The requested output type '{0}' does not match the declared output type '{1}' for {2} '{3}'

data.name: DAPR1305Title
data.value: Workflow implementations do not support dependency injection via constructors

data.name: DAPR1305MessageFormat
data.value: Workflow '{0}' has constructor parameter '{1}' of type '{2}', but dependency injection is not supported in workflow implementations. Move dependencies to a WorkflowActivity instead.
